---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Orca Community Edition
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's your use case?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Describe the desired behavior.

## User Experience

How would a developer interact with this feature? (CLI command, dashboard UI, config file, etc.)

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why they're less ideal.

## Implementation Notes

(Optional) If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented, share them here.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, mockups, or references.

## Are you willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] I'd like help implementing this
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting
